title: Screwdriver
description: A quality of live datapack / mod that adds a screwdriver wich have no cooldown and can instant mine all copper and iron blocks
body:
# 🪛Screwdriver 1.0🪛

_Screwdriver is a datapack / mod that adds a new tool that can destroy copper and iron blocks instantly (the new items from the copperage drop are currently not supported but will be soon)
it has also no attack cooldown and makes the damage like a stone sword_

## The Screwdriver:
- **has no attack cooldown**
- **makes the damage like a stone / copper sword**
- **destroy all copper / iron blocks instantly**
- perfect for builders
- ➡️get it with ```/function screwdriver:give_screwdriver```


<details>
<summary>Crafting recipe</summary>
Its easily craftet with 1 iron ingot, 1 iron nugget 1 stick

  ![the recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aec822bbc332407db5e05dd412da2ddb8f33c980.png)



</details>


<details>
<summary>The item</summary>

![The item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b2cacdfaef13f9712f5951f5788f09537d5ca6b.png)

_here you can see the screwdriver in the inventory_


</details>


<details>
<summary>Updates🔄️</summary>

### Version 1.1

- supports now the new items from "The copper age"
- has now durability (250 like an iron pickaxe)

Be sure if you update this mod the durability thing will only receive new crafted screwdrivers

</details>





  
  
<details>
